---
title: "Christy Choi"
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
```

::: {#hero-heading}
Hello! Welcome to my portfolio page.

If you'd like to read more about my background and works, feel free to navigate through this page!

[<i class="bi bi-github" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>](https://github.com/christychoicc) [<i class="bi bi-envelope" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>](mailto:choichichinchristy@outlook.com)

[Learn more about me →](about.qmd){.about-links .subtitle}
:::
